_description: Hand-authored pipeline descriptions, shared across every UI variant and every workspace. Keyed by pipeline id (the Python function name — same join key used everywhere else). This is the SINGLE place to edit a pipeline's description text; see schemas/pipeline_descriptions.schema.json for the contract, formatting rules, and deploy notes.

descriptions.snt_dhis2_extract: Extracts DHIS2 pyramid, routine analytics, population, shapes, and reporting rates for a period.
descriptions.snt_dhis2_formatting: Processes and formats the DHIS2 extracts (pyramid, shapes, routine data) for the SNT workflow.
descriptions.snt_dhis2_outliers_imputation_magic_glas: Outlier detection and imputation using the Magic Glasses (MAD-based) method.
descriptions.snt_dhis2_outliers_imputation_mean: Outlier detection and imputation using the mean +/- k x SD method.
descriptions.snt_dhis2_outliers_imputation_median: Outlier detection and imputation using the median +/- k x MAD method.
descriptions.snt_dhis2_outliers_imputation_iqr: Outlier detection and imputation using the IQR (inter-quartile range) method.
descriptions.snt_dhis2_outliers_imputation_path: Outlier detection and imputation using the PATH method (mean +/- 10 x SD).
descriptions.snt_dhis2_reporting_rate_dataelement: Reporting rate computed from routine data elements.
descriptions.snt_dhis2_reporting_rate_dataset: Reporting rate from DHIS2 dataset-level rate indicators.
descriptions.snt_dhis2_population_transformation: Scales, projects, and disaggregates DHIS2 population by demographic group.
descriptions.snt_dhis2_incidence: Computes malaria case metrics and yearly incidence from routine HMIS data.
descriptions.snt_seasonality_cases: Classifies case seasonality at ADM2 from routine confirmed-malaria data.
descriptions.snt_worldpop_extract: Extracts WorldPop population raster data for the country.
descriptions.snt_map_extracts: Extracts Malaria Atlas Project rasters and computes zonal statistics.
descriptions.snt_healthcare_access: Computes access-to-care metrics from facilities, population, and catchments.
descriptions.snt_dhs_indicators: Computes DHS survey-based indicators for the SNT process.
descriptions.snt_era5_climate_data: Extracts ERA5 climate data from the Copernicus Climate Data Store.
descriptions.snt_seasonality_rainfall: Computes rainfall seasonality metrics from ERA5 climate data.
